texto: I do not try, Lord, to attain Your lofty heights, because my understanding is in no way equal to it. But I do desire to understand Your truth a little, that truth that my heart believes and loves. For I do not seek to understand so that I may believe; but I believe so that I may understand. For I believe this also, that “unless I believe, I shall not understand.
explicacao: Citação de Anslem of Canterbury sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I do not try, Lord, to attain Your lofty heights, because my understanding is in no way equal to …” articula amor, christianity, inspiracional em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspiracional.
